transcript: Speaker A: Want to learn chess? Prove it. All right, let's start with the knight. Giddy up! You've got potential. But don't get too cocky... This isn't checkers, darling. My blood pressure is rising! Finally, a move worthy of applause. Duolingo Chess is available on the latest app version! Download it now and start building your strategy.
on_screen_text:
Want to learn chess?
Prove it.
Solve the puzzle
Alright, let's start with the knight.
Nicely done!
Giddy up! You've got potential.
But don't get too cocky...
TRY AGAIN
This isn't checkers, darling.
My blood pressure is rising!
Finally, a move worthy of applause.
Duolingo Chess is available on the latest app version!
Download it now and start building your strategy.
duolingo
summary: The ad introduces Duolingo Chess, challenging viewers to solve chess puzzles. It showcases gameplay with the character Oscar reacting to correct and incorrect moves. The call to action encourages users to download the latest Duolingo app version to start building their chess strategy.
